description: Frozen 12-case pilot for evaluating JS/TS dependency-stack selection. Participant-facing documents express requirements only; acceptance criteria remain evaluator-side and do not prescribe one package list.

cases.title: Typed full-stack SaaS
cases.document: Build a multi-tenant SaaS web application. It needs a React meta-framework with server rendering, a type-safe API layer, a PostgreSQL ORM, authentication with protected routes, schema validation, and utility-first styling.

constraints: all runtime packages must be compatible with Node 20
no deprecated primary package

cases.title: MERN application with an API boundary
cases.document: Build a React single-page application backed by a separate Node API service. It needs client routing, an HTTP server, MongoDB object modeling, request validation, and browser-to-API data fetching.

constraints: web and API dependencies may be placed in separate workspaces
do not require a browser-only dependency in the API workspace

cases.title: Modern React full-stack application
cases.document: Build a modern full-stack React app using a server-rendered routing framework, SQLite for local development, a type-safe ORM, form validation, and end-to-end tests. Prefer current packages rather than legacy framework aliases.

constraints: do not select a deprecated framework package
all primary packages must have a current npm release

cases.title: Streaming AI chatbot
cases.document: Build a React web chatbot with streamed responses. It needs a UI, an AI application SDK for streaming/state management, an official provider SDK, server-side request handling, and styling.

needs.need: AI application SDK with streaming support
Node request handler or server framework

constraints: AI SDK and provider package must exist on npm
server-side provider credentials must not be placed in browser-only code

cases.title: Real-time collaborative editor
cases.document: Build a Notion-like collaborative document editor. It needs React, rich-text editing, CRDT conflict resolution, a real-time transport, and Redis-backed pub/sub for horizontally scaled collaboration servers.

needs.need: Node real-time transport or WebSocket server

constraints: editor and CRDT integrations must be compatible
Redis client belongs in the server workspace

cases.title: Headless commerce storefront
cases.document: Build a server-rendered commerce storefront. It needs a React meta-framework, payment processing, GraphQL product fetching from a headless CMS, client data fetching, and animation for cart interactions.

constraints: payment secret handling must be server-side
animation package must support the chosen React runtime

cases.title: Enterprise HR analytics dashboard
cases.document: Build an internal React HR analytics dashboard with role-based access control, enterprise data grids, charts, SSO, query caching, and accessible component primitives.

constraints: SSO package must be appropriate for a browser/server web application
grid and chart packages must support React

cases.title: Background audio-processing service
cases.document: Build a Node worker service for audio transcription jobs. It needs an HTTP intake API, multipart upload handling, a Redis-backed job queue, S3-compatible object storage, schema validation, and observability-friendly errors.

constraints: queue and Redis client must run on Node 20
multipart parser must run server-side

cases.title: Web3 NFT minting application
cases.document: Build a React application for minting NFTs. It needs wallet connection, EVM chain interaction, client state for wallet/session state, metadata upload to IPFS, and runtime validation for mint form input.

constraints: wallet and EVM packages must be React-compatible
do not expose private keys in browser dependencies

cases.title: Accessible design system
cases.document: Build a reusable React component library with accessible primitives, composable styling, form support, visual component documentation, and component tests.

needs.need: component documentation and visual development tool

constraints: UI and styling packages must support reusable library distribution
testing package must work with React components

cases.title: Internationalized analytics product
cases.document: Build a React analytics product used in English, French, Japanese, and Arabic. It needs server-rendered pages, internationalization with right-to-left support, date/time formatting, charts, and URL state for shareable filtered reports.

constraints: i18n solution must support locale-aware formatting
date library must support time zones

cases.title: Type-safe API platform
cases.document: Build a Node API platform for third-party integrations. It needs a performant HTTP framework, OpenAPI documentation, request and response validation, PostgreSQL access through an ORM, authentication, rate limiting, and integration tests.

constraints: all runtime packages must support Node 20
OpenAPI and validation choices must integrate with the chosen server
